description: PHASE B — STRESS: $100,000 cash withdrawn for emergency regulatory compliance payment. Drops backing below 100% and liquidity below 10%. Demonstrates that a simple reserves-vs-supply check catches backing drop, but ONLY Converge.fi catches the liquidity crisis — because $385K of reserves are locked in T-bills that cannot be redeemed for weeks or months.

portfolioAdjustments.reason: $100K withdrawn — emergency regulatory compliance payment to state authority
